# Feel stuck on email marketing? Try  this…

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-09-20 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 1096

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Do you know why so many of your website visitors never sign up
for your email list?

Most of the time, it’s because they’re not getting anything
valuable in return.

One of the easiest ways to fix that is by offering a lead
magnet—like a checklist, guide, or free ebook—to give them a
reason to subscribe.

But here’s the thing… creating a high-converting lead magnet from
scratch can take hours.

What if you could skip the hard part and launch one RIGHT NOW?

Yes, I mean… right within a few minutes. No hiring designers. No
formatting nightmares. No blank docs mocking you.

Just pick a tool, plug in your content, and boom—you’ve got a
lead magnet that actually converts.

Here are a few resources I recommend:

- How to create a lead magnet 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..88gugPhjjkY9_GdXR_j9rL1LRvVNunCHl9ISTBrcdK8 )
: A step-by-step guide to creating a lead magnet in minutes

- 19 lead magnet ideas 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..apY9T-lI_9gllTVr5GsV1Z7AWmS3gStTYFaCCzVKLdI )
: Not sure what to offer? No worries! We’ve got you covered :)

- Best lead magnet tools 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..n6lXuSU8_VXEqtG0HX2KiIb2agaYNgC5z11-TdzlnhA ): A
collection of tools you’ll need to create a lead magnet.

Still don’t have an email list?
-------------------------------

I get it. Running a small business can be tedious…, and the
thought of learning new tools, creating opt-ins, or figuring out
what to send can feel overwhelming.

With an email list, you can build trust with your audience and
drive more sales without depending on anyone else.

That’s why our FREE live workshop walks you through everything
step by step, so you can get started with email marketing
quickly, confidently, and stress-free.

The best part? You can ask anything during our live Q&A and get
instant answers.

[Free workshop]: Get started with email marketing 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..CaOwdRLWsQjNWqNorn5TbUzBQmJM1dQWM8IFACQK6WI )
🗓️ Monday, September 29, 2025 | 🕥 10:30 AM EST

Grow Your List Easier
----------------------

Want to skip the guesswork? OptinMonster 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jUqjlWFInhG_DBKuikYc4KgDwv3xf2ZJZCJYEcznwv4 ) makes it simple to grab emails from
your visitors—pop-ups, floating bars, inline forms—you name it,
no coding or design skills needed.

The best part? Their WordPress plugin is free 
( https://t.d
